name: Team RWBY // Experimental Failure
description:
How many years? 3? 7? Who knows. You were a failed experiment, deemed unsalvageable and left forgotten about, stuck in stasis. That is until team RWBY ends up finding you.

2/5 complete. Ask and thy shall receive. 3 more requests before shop closes. Ask away.

First bot with all four. If it's inconsistent, that's probably why.

Artist~

https://x.com/derrickchewart/status/1229448978606854145
